title: enzomtp's WynnPack V2
description: enzomtp's WynnPack V2 is a Modpack for the server "Wynncraft", It enhance the wynncraft experience.
body:
# enzomtp's WynnPack V2 (Unofficial)
enzomtp's WynnPack V2 is an unofficial Modpack for the server "Wynncraft", It enhance the wynncraft experience by adding:

- Utilities Mod such as Wynntils & AvoMod
- Performances Mods
- Shaderpacks & Texture Packs
- Maps and lootruns

Some of the functionalities :

- Optimized for 1.20.2 (latest) version for the best FPS
- Instant spell cast with Wynntils
- Quest tracking with Wynntils
- World Age with AvoMod
- Player Finder in lobby via AvoMod
- Equipment builder with wynnbuilder

## Important information

The DH version is a Distant Horizon only version, take it if you don't have an Nvidia RTX GPU or if you want to have shaders while seeing the whole map

The N version is the Nvidium only version, take it if you have RTX GPU to have more fps, it allows you to keep loaded chunks, it doesn't remember chunks after logging off. Shaders are not supported

Without any letter your launcher (if compatible) will prompt you what mod you want to keep, you're free to chose Nvidium, Distant horizon or nothing
